name: Tater Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Slather yogurt onto the chicken pieces, with or without skin.
2. Dredge in a mixture of Parmesan cheese and instant potato flakes.
3. Bake at 375°F for about 30 minutes, turning off after 15 minutes.
Note: The original 'tater baked chicken' was Guy Attwood's recipe. I have always covered chicken and fish with YOGURT for baking or broiling in this manner and used flavored bread crumbs. This cheese/potato mixture makes a different taste treat. It is WONDERFUL! Crispy and not at all fatty. This is a new household favorite.
